name: CRED.AGRICOLE ADR 1/2/EO3
summary: CRED.AGRICOLE ADR 1/2/EO3 is likely referring to Credit Agricole S.A., a French international banking group and the world's largest cooperative financial institution, represented by an American Depositary Receipt (ADR). It provides a range of financial services including retail banking, corporate and investment banking, asset management, and insurance. Credit Agricole is headquartered in Paris, France.
